title: The Rats of Tobruk
writer: Charles Chauvel, Elsa Chauvel, Maxwell Dunn
actors: Grant Taylor, Peter Finch, Chips Rafferty
plot: Tells the story of three men--Bluey, a tough two fisted drover (Taylor), Milo, a laconic dingo trapper (Rafferty), and Pete, an intellectual English "new chum" (Finch). Together they serve in North Africa, fighting against the for...
